org.key_project.util.java

Class ObjectUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.java.ObjectUtil

  • public final class ObjectUtil
extends Object
    Provides static methods to work with objects.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private ObjectUtil()
      Forbid instances by this private constructor.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static <T> Comparator<T> createEqualsComparator()
      Creates a Comparator that can be used to compute the equality of two given Objects.
      static boolean equals(Object first, Object second)
      Nullpointer save execution of Object.equals(Object).
      static Field findField(Class<?> classInstance, String fieldName)
      Finds the Field with the name inside the given Class.
      static Method findMethod(Class<?> classInstance, String methodName, Class... parameterClasses)
      Finds the Method in the given Class.
      static <T> T get(Object obj, Class<?> classInstance, String fieldName)
      Returns the value from the field.
      static <T> T get(Object obj, Field field)
      Returns the value from the field.
      static <T> T get(Object obj, String fieldName)
      Returns the value from the field.
      static Class<?> getClass(Object obj)
      Nullpointer save execution of Object.getClass().
      static int hashCode(Object obj)
      Nullpointer save execution of Object.hashCode()
      static <T> T invoke(Object obj, Method method, Object... parameters)
      Executes the method on the given Object.
      static <T> T invoke(Object obj, String methodName, Object... parameters)
      Executes the method on the given Object.

      Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.

      Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.

      Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.

      Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.

      Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.

      Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.

      Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.

      • ObjectUtil

        Forbid instances by this private constructor.

    • Method Detail

      • get

        public static <T> T get(Object obj,
        String fieldName)
             throws SecurityException,
                    NoSuchFieldException,
                    IllegalArgumentException,
                    IllegalAccessException
        Returns the value from the field.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The value type.
        Parameters:
        obj - The object to read from.
        fieldName - The name of the field.
        Returns:
        The field value.
        Throws:
        SecurityException - Occurred Exception.
        NoSuchFieldException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalArgumentException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalAccessException - Occurred Exception.

      • get

        public static <T> T get(Object obj,
        Class<?> classInstance,
        String fieldName)
             throws SecurityException,
                    NoSuchFieldException,
                    IllegalArgumentException,
                    IllegalAccessException
        Returns the value from the field.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The value type.
        Parameters:
        obj - The object to read from.
        classInstance - The class in that the field is declared.
        fieldName - The name of the field.
        Returns:
        The field value.
        Throws:
        SecurityException - Occurred Exception.
        NoSuchFieldException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalArgumentException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalAccessException - Occurred Exception.

        public static <T> T get(Object obj,
        Field field)
             throws IllegalArgumentException,
                    IllegalAccessException
        Returns the value from the field.
        Type Parameters:

        Parameters:
        obj - The object to read from.
        field - The Field to read.
        Returns:
        The field value.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalAccessException - Occurred Exception.

        public static void set(Object obj,
       String fieldName,
       Object value)
                throws SecurityException,
                       NoSuchFieldException,
                       IllegalArgumentException,
                       IllegalAccessException
        Sets the value of the given field on the given Object.
        Parameters:
        obj - The object to write to.
        fieldName - The name of the field.
        value - The value to write.
        Throws:
        SecurityException - Occurred Exception.
        NoSuchFieldException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalArgumentException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalAccessException - Occurred Exception.

      • findField

        public static Field findField(Class<?> classInstance,
              String fieldName)
                       throws SecurityException,
                              NoSuchFieldException
        Finds the Field with the name inside the given Class.
        Parameters:
        classInstance - The Class to search in.
        fieldName - The name of the field.
        Returns:
        The found Field.
        Throws:
        SecurityException - Occurred Exception.
        NoSuchFieldException - Occurred Exception.

      • invoke

        public static <T> T invoke(Object obj,
           String methodName,
           Object... parameters)
                throws NoSuchMethodException,
                       IllegalArgumentException,
                       IllegalAccessException,
                       InvocationTargetException
        Executes the method on the given Object.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The return type
        Parameters:
        obj - The Object to execute on.
        methodName -
        parameters - The method parameters.
        Returns:
        The method result.
        Throws:
        NoSuchMethodException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalArgumentException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalAccessException - Occurred Exception.
        InvocationTargetException - Occurred Exception.

      • invoke

        public static <T> T invoke(Object obj,
           Method method,
           Object... parameters)
                throws IllegalArgumentException,
                       IllegalAccessException,
                       InvocationTargetException
        Executes the method on the given Object.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The return type
        Parameters:
        obj - The Object to execute on.
        method - The Method to execute.
        parameters - The method parameters.
        Returns:
        The method result.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - Occurred Exception.
        IllegalAccessException - Occurred Exception.
        InvocationTargetException - Occurred Exception.

      • findMethod

        public static Method findMethod(Class<?> classInstance,
                String methodName,
                Class... parameterClasses)
                         throws NoSuchMethodException
        Finds the Method in the given Class.
        Parameters:
        classInstance - The Class to search in.
        methodName - The method name to search.
        parameterClasses - The parameter Classes.
        Returns:
        The found Method.
        Throws:
        NoSuchMethodException - Occurred Exception

      • equals

        public static boolean equals(Object first,
             Object second)
        Nullpointer save execution of Object.equals(Object). The two objects are also equal if both references are null
        Parameters:
        first - The first Object.
        second - The second Object.
        Returns:
        true objects are equal or both null, false otherwise

      • toString

        public static String toString(Object obj)
        Nullpointer save execution of Object.toString().
        Parameters:
        obj - The object to execute to string on.
        Returns:
        The string value or null if the object is null.

      • hashCode

        public static int hashCode(Object obj)
        Nullpointer save execution of Object.hashCode()
        Parameters:
        obj - The object to get the hashcode from.
        Returns:
        The hashcode that is might 0 if the object was null.

      • createEqualsComparator

        public static <T> Comparator<T> createEqualsComparator()
        Creates a Comparator that can be used to compute the equality of two given Objects. They are seen as equal if equals(Object, Object) tells it. In this case 0 is returned in Comparator.compare(Object, Object). If they are not equal Comparator.compare(Object, Object) returns a value different to 0.
        Returns:
        The created Comparator.

      • getClass

        public static Class<?> getClass(Object obj)
        Nullpointer save execution of Object.getClass().
        Parameters:
        obj - The object to execute get class on.
        Returns:
        The Class or null if the object is null.

      • waitForThreads

        public static void waitForThreads(Thread[] threads)
        Waits until the given Threads have terminated.
        Parameters:
        threads - The Threads to wait for.

      • sleep

        public static void sleep(int time)
        Sleeps the current Thread for the given time.
        Parameters:
        time - The time to sleep.
